item.title: Walmart customers seeking value drive sales higher
item.description: Walmart posted 5.6% revenue growth in the fourth quarter, led by higher transactions, cooling grocery inflation and record digital penetration.

item.title: Spirit Airlines to sell 20 jets, recalls furloughed flight attendants
